name: equip_best_gear
description: Equip the best available armor and ready the best weapon after inventory changes. Prefer the best armor pieces, then choose a preferred weapon if present, otherwise the strongest melee weapon, while keeping food and blocks in hotbar if possible. Do not move or fight; stop after gear is equipped.
parameters: z.object({ preferredWeapon: z.string().trim().min(1).max(80).default("stone_sword").describe("Preferred weapon item name to ready in hand if it is currently available, for example stone_sword or bow"), ensureArmor: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to equip the highest-scoring armor piece available for each armor slot"), keepFoodAccessible: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to keep at least one food stack in the hotbar when inventory space allows"), keepBlocksAccessible: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to keep at least one placeable block stack in the hotbar when inventory space allows"), maxTicks: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(40).describe("Safety budget for the maximum number of inventory equip or slot-move operations this one-shot action may attempt") })

name: panic_retreat_and_block
description: Emergency low-health survival action: immediately sprint directly away from the nearest hostile while facing/checking it, avoid allied players, place available solid blocks such as oak planks between/behind the bot and hostiles when they are within 3 blocks or line of approach is clear, keep retreating until at least 10 blocks of separation is reached or the time limit ends, then stop in the safest nearby open spot. Do not attack unless completely body-blocked; prioritize escape and barriers.
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(2).max(64).default(10).describe("Stop retreating once the nearest hostile is at least this many blocks away"), maxRetreatDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(80).default(12).describe("Maximum distance in blocks to try to move away from the starting position during this emergency retreat"), maxDurationTicks: z.number().int().min(5).max(600).default(120).describe("Maximum active Minecraft ticks to spend retreating; frozen world time does not count"), minimumHealthToAttempt: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(1).describe("Do not start if current health is at or below this value; use 0 to attempt at any positive health"), blockItemNames: z.array(z.string().min(1)).max(16).default(["oak_planks"]).describe("Inventory block item names that may be placed as emergency barriers, for example oak_planks or dirt"), maxBarrierBlocks: z.number().int().min(0).max(64).default(12).describe("Maximum number of barrier blocks this action may place"), hostileSearchRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(96).default(32).describe("Radius in blocks for finding current hostile mobs to flee from"), placeBarrierWhenHostileWithinBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(12).default(3).describe("Try to place a barrier when the nearest hostile is within this many blocks, or when its line of approach is clear"), avoidPlayers: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Bias the retreat direction away from nearby allied player entities") })
